docs.heading: Select documents
docs.subheading: Choose one or more documents to include in your order.

language.heading: Choose document language
language.subheading: Both languages are included in the same Word document — fully bilingual.

notice.heading: Online Payments Coming Soon
notice.bodyLine1: Uzcard, Humo, Visa & Mastercard coming soon. For now, place your order via email.
notice.emailNote: Orders are currently accepted via email request
notice.uzsBillingNote: All payments are processed in Uzbek soum (UZS). If you pay with a foreign-currency card (Visa/Mastercard), your issuing bank will convert the UZS charge to your card currency at its own rate, which may include conversion fees and commissions. The Seller is not responsible for the difference between the indicative USD price and the final amount charged by your bank.

form.heading: Order details
form.documentsHint: You may select multiple documents — they will all be included in your request.
form.termsLabel: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Sale</terms>, <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> and <cookies>Cookie Policy</cookies>.

success.heading: Request Submitted
success.subheading: Thank you! We will contact you within one business day to confirm your order and arrange payment.

confirm.heading: Confirm your order
confirm.subheading: Please review the details below before submitting your request.
